sourceSummary.oneLine: Supplier approval sheet for BLUE_1417_GASKET part MKK-100102 submitted by 성준테크 to ㈜H&abyz.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Documents part approval, revision history, drawing section, material list, material properties section, QC process flow, and product inspection criteria for the gasket part.
keyPoints: Product name is BLUE_1417_GASKET and drawing/item/part number is MKK-100102.
Applicable models are G1417CW, G1417FW, G1417CWP, and G1417FWP.
Supplier is 성준테크㈜ and customer is ㈜H&abyz.
Revision history records Rev. 0 dated 2025.05.22 as 최초제정.
Material list identifies SH0130U used inside the product, maker KCC실리콘, with non-use certificate marked ND for Cd, Pb, Hg, Cr6+, PBB, and PBDE.
QC process chart is dated 2025.05.22 with Revision No. 0 and Mass-Prod selected.

reviewFlags.reason: No FDA, regulatory authority, or jurisdiction is stated in the source text despite authoritySignal metadata indicating FDA.
No formal standards are cited in the source text; DVS/PVS/PRS/SOP appears as a control plan category rather than a standard citation.
Revision is represented as Rev. 00 on the cover and Rev. 0 in revision history/QC sections.
Some source content appears extracted from a spreadsheet with comma-separated layout and sparse cells; page references are not available.
